title: Characterizing the Folding Transition State Ensembles in the Energy Landscape of an RNA Tetraloop - available data.
author: Viegas, R. G.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Trajectory file and scripts necessary to generate an ELViM [Oliveira, A. B.; Yang, H.; Whitford, P. C.; Leite, V. B. P. JCTC, 2019, 15, p.6482] projection of the conformational space for the GCAA tetraloop.
steps_raw: Trajectory file and scripts necessary to generate an ELViM [Oliveira, A. B.; Yang, H.; Whitford, P. C.; Leite, V. B. P. JCTC, 2019, 15, p.6482] projection of the conformational space for the GCAA tetraloop.
